inputsClass.name: activeItem
inputsClass.rawdescription: Key of the currently active / selected item.
inputsClass.description: Key of the currently active / selected item.

inputsClass.description: Navigation items shown in the scrollable list.

outputsClass.rawdescription: Emits when the main menu toggle is clicked.

components.description:
Left navigation sidebar — 60 px wide, dark navy vertical column.

Each item is an icon + label stacked vertically. A top scroll button, a scrollable link list, a bottom scroll button, and a Logout row complete the component.

The activeItem key highlights the corresponding item.
components.rawdescription:
Left navigation sidebar — 60 px wide, dark navy vertical column.

Each item is an icon + label stacked vertically. A top scroll button, a
scrollable link list, a bottom scroll button, and a Logout row complete
the component.

The `activeItem` key highlights the corresponding item.
components.templateData: @for (item of items; track item.key) { }

components.name: ToggleButtonGroupComponent

inputsClass.name: color
inputsClass.rawdescription: Color theme applied to the selected button and group border.
inputsClass.description: Color theme applied to the selected button and group border.

inputsClass.name: disabled
inputsClass.rawdescription: Disables all buttons in the group.

inputsClass.name: multiple
inputsClass.rawdescription:
When `true`, multiple buttons can be selected simultaneously.
When `false` (default), behaves like a radio group — selecting one
deselects the others.
inputsClass.description: When true, multiple buttons can be selected simultaneously. When false (default), behaves like a radio group — selecting one deselects the others.

inputsClass.name: options
inputsClass.rawdescription: Array of button options to render.

inputsClass.name: size
inputsClass.rawdescription: Height / padding scale: `sm` = 24 px, `md` = 32 px, `lg` = 40 px.

inputsClass.name: value
inputsClass.rawdescription:
Currently selected value(s).
Pass a `string` when `multiple = false`, or `string[]` when `multiple = true`.
inputsClass.description: Currently selected value(s). Pass a string when multiple = false, or string[] when multiple = true.

outputsClass.name: valueChange
outputsClass.rawdescription: Emits the new selected value (or array of values) after each toggle.
outputsClass.description: Emits the new selected value (or array of values) after each toggle.

propertiesClass.name: checkIcon
propertiesClass.description: Pre-sanitised checkmark icon rendered in selected label-buttons.
propertiesClass.rawdescription: Pre-sanitised checkmark icon rendered in selected label-buttons.

methodsClass.name: isIconOnly
methodsClass.rawdescription: Returns true when the option has no label (icon-only button).
methodsClass.description: Returns true when the option has no label (icon-only button).

methodsClass.name: isSelected
methodsClass.rawdescription: Returns true when the given option value is currently selected.
methodsClass.description: Returns true when the given option value is currently selected.

methodsClass.name: onToggle
methodsClass.rawdescription: Called when a button is clicked. Updates the internal selection model.
methodsClass.description: Called when a button is clicked. Updates the internal selection model.

methodsClass.name: safeIcon
methodsClass.rawdescription: Returns a sanitised SafeHtml for user-supplied icon SVGs.
methodsClass.description: Returns a sanitised SafeHtml for user-supplied icon SVGs.
